name: Churu Dog Treat - Chicken with Salmon Recipe 4 Tubes
shortDescription: Treat your furry companion to something special with Churu Chicken Recipe with Salmon Treat for Dogs. These delicious treats are made with real chicken and salmon and come in convenient 4-tube packs. Satisfy your dog's cravings and provide them with essential nutrients in every bite.
description: Treat your furry companion to something truly special with Churu Chicken Recipe with Salmon Treats for Dogs . Crafted with real farm-raised chicken and flavorful salmon , these creamy, lickable treats deliver an irresistible taste that dogs love while supporting their overall health and hydration. Each pack includes 4 convenient tubes , perfectly portioned for easy feeding at home or on the go. With a high moisture content , Churu treats help keep your dog hydrated, making them especially beneficial for dogs that don’t drink enough water. They are also low in calories , allowing you to reward your dog guilt-free. Why Dogs Love Churu: Made with real chicken and salmon for a rich, savory flavor Soft, creamy texture that’s easy to lick and digest High moisture content to support daily hydration Versatile feeding options : hand-feed directly from the tube, serve in a bowl, or use as a tasty food topper Ideal for training rewards or hiding medication Free from grains, artificial colors, preservatives, and carrageenan, Inaba Churu treats are a wholesome and safe choice for dogs of all breeds and life stages. Turn treat time into a fun bonding moment while giving your dog a snack you can trust.
